rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §33.203, which governs UIL preparticipation physical evaluation forms for student athletes.
quote: Each student participating in an extracurricular athletic activity must complete the University Interscholastic League forms entitled "Preparticipation Physical Evaluation--Medical History" and "Acknowledgment of Rules."
_note: No overlap between proposed tax change and this education athletics rule.
